short_description.value: FoMo-Net is a pretraining framework for remote sensing foundation models, designed to process any combination of commonly used modalities and spectral bands in remote sensing. It is trained on a diverse set of satellite and aerial datasets and evaluated on the FoMo-Bench benchmark for forest monitoring tasks.

masking_strategy.value: Random spectral band selection and token masking

pretraining.value: Masked autoencoding with random spectral band selection, spectral and positional embeddings, and gradient accumulation, trained on a mixture of satellite and aerial datasets covering a wide range of modalities and spatial resolutions.

value.value: Single shared linear projection for all spectral bands

cloud_cover.value: Sentinel-2 data selected with cloud coverage below 30%

application.value: Land use/land cover and tree species recognition
Tree crown detection and biomass estimation
